title: Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker 6m X 6mm- Extendable, Flexible Hand-fed Spiral Rod| Removes Stubborn Blockages and Clears Drains| Circular Storage Drum| Ergonomic Pistol| Spiral Rod With Corkscrew Tip
features: Powerful Unblocking Performance: The Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker features a robust 6-meter extendable, flexible hand-fed spiral rod designed to tackle stubborn blockages and clear drains effectively. Its corkscrew tip easily penetrates and removes debris, hair, and other obstructions that can cause clogs.

Versatile & Flexible Design: With a 6mm diameter, this unblocker’s flexible spiral rod adapts to various drain sizes and shapes, allowing for thorough cleaning of both kitchen and bathroom sinks, as well as other plumbing fixtures. Its extendable nature provides access to hard-to-reach areas, ensuring comprehensive blockage removal.

Ergonomic Pistol Grip: Designed for ease of use, the unblocker includes an ergonomic pistol grip handle that offers a comfortable, secure hold. This design minimizes hand strain and enhances control, making the unblocking process more efficient and less tiring.

Circular Storage Drum: The unblocker comes with a circular storage drum that keeps the spiral rod neatly coiled and tangle-free when not in use. This practical feature ensures easy storage and quick deployment, reducing clutter and extending the life of the tool.

Durable & Reliable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, the Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker is built to withstand frequent use and resist wear and tear. Its durable construction ensures long-term reliability, making it a valuable addition to any home maintenance toolkit.
description: Introducing the Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker, a versatile and highly effective tool designed to tackle even the most stubborn blockages in your plumbing system. Measuring 6 meters in length and 6 millimeters in diameter, this extendable and flexible hand-fed spiral rod is engineered to clear drains with ease, ensuring a smooth flow and efficient performance. The unique corkscrew tip of the spiral rod penetrates deep into the drain, effectively breaking up and removing obstructions such as hair, grease, and debris that can cause clogs and slow drainage. The Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker is housed in a circular storage drum, which not only keeps the rod neatly coiled but also makes it easy to store and access when needed. This practical design ensures that the tool remains tangle-free and ready for use, providing convenience and efficiency for every drain-cleaning task. The ergonomic pistol grip offers comfortable handling and precise control, reducing strain on your hand and wrist during use. Whether you're dealing with a blocked sink, shower drain, or bathtub, this unblocker delivers reliable results, helping to prevent the inconvenience and expense of professional plumbing services. Ideal for both home and professional use, the Dekton Sink & Drain Unblocker is an essential addition to your toolkit. Its extendable, flexible nature allows you to navigate through tight spaces and reach deep blockages with minimal effort. Designed with durability and effectiveness in mind, this unblocker ensures long-lasting performance and consistent results.
